title: osu!
description: A popular rhythm game I enjoy playing competitively. Great for hand-eye coordination and music appreciation.

title: Valorant
description: A tactical first-person shooter by Riot Games. I enjoy the strategic team-based gameplay.

title: Fortnite
description: A highly demanding battle royale with building mechanics. Fast-paced and creative.

title: Static Portfolio Site
description: My original personal portfolio built with plain HTML and CSS. The foundation this app is migrating from.

title: SQL Database Project
description: A backend database project built during an internship. Involved designing tables, views, and connecting to a frontend.

title: Games Showcase Page
description: A dedicated HTML/CSS page showcasing games I play, with logos and descriptions. Part of the original static site.

title: Rhythm Games
description: A deep interest in rhythm games as a genre, from osu! to Beat Saber. I enjoy the intersection of music and precision gameplay.

title: Gaming
description: Passionate about gaming across multiple genres, competitive shooters, battle royales, and rhythm games.

title: Web Development
description: Interested in building modern, responsive web apps. Currently learning React, Tailwind, and full-stack patterns.

title: Technology & Software
description: Broadly interested in how software is built, from system design to UI/UX. Always exploring new tools and frameworks.
